title: Wire verified LICHEN announce RX into gateway network-location ingestion
description: The no-hardware announce-location slice adds a decoded announce coordinate decoder/table and tested gateway_network_location_submit_announce() boundary. Production C gateway/L2 still needs a real caller: parse LICHEN announce frames from RF/native simulation, verify signature/pubkey/IID/TOFU/sequence freshness, update peer/gradient state, then feed decoded app_data coords into gateway_network_location_submit_announce(). Include no-hardware simulator coverage where possible and a chained hardware/RF validation Bead for real LoRa receive paths.
